name: AWP | 后翼弃兵
descriptionEn: High risk and high reward, the infamous AWP is recognizable by its signature report and one-shot, one-kill policy. It has been custom painted using royal blue and gold. A queen has been hand painted in front of the butt stock. Every shot is a royal decree of power and precision
descriptionZh: 高风险，高回报，恶名昭彰的 AWP 因其标志性的枪声和一枪一个的准则而为人熟知。 采用宝蓝与金色定制涂装，枪托前方手绘女王图案。 每一发，都是权力与精准的皇家敕令
